added: Recall — persistent memory via Somadian graph store. Cross-session, cross-project knowledge.
Async agent comms — Soma reaches you on your phone when decisions are needed.
Content versioning — know when hub protocols update, diff before upgrading.
Boot sequence extraction — move hardcoded behavior into user-editable MAPs.
Child MLR writing — background children persist a Memory Lane Reflection on exit, so `harvest` returns the real reflection instead of a placeholder.
Statusline children-count + cost badge — at-a-glance visibility into background fleet and spend.
AppleScript terminal drivers (ghostty, iTerm, Terminal.app) — macOS-native background panes for users who want OS-level windows.

timeline.title: Same-cycle audit patches

added: **soma model-sync** — one command puts every project on the current model. Audits global + project + any crawled `.soma/` dirs and bumps them together. Bundled default is `claude-opus-4-7`.
fixed: Task text with shell characters (`$(…)`, backticks, apostrophes) now arrives at background children exactly as written. Previously a literal task string could be interpreted before the child saw it.
`soma model-sync` no longer chokes on model ids containing an apostrophe — the write path takes values through the environment instead of interpolating them into shell.

timeline.tagline: Audit-cycle patch: tmux quoting, model-sync injection fix, and the four-command post-update flow.

timeline.title: Children control panel + tmux baseline

added: **Background children work for every user** — tmux is the shipping baseline. `delegate(background:true)` spawns a child in a detached session; attach any time with `tmux attach -t soma-child-<id>` to watch it work.
**children tail / steer / kill / harvest** — the full control panel. Peek a child's pane without focusing it, inject a steering message, stop a stuck child, or read its reflection and clean up.
**soma terminals CLI** — pick your terminal driver. `soma terminals prefer tmux` saves your choice for every future delegation.
`/reload` greets you with `[Soma Boot — /reloaded]` so you know the reload took effect and any "needs /reload" work from last turn is live.
Background-delegation guide with install hints, the attach-on-demand pattern, and troubleshooting.
changed: Model aliases (`haiku`, `sonnet`, `opus`) resolve to full model ids before a child spawns, so children always launch with the model you asked for.
`children list` keeps itself honest — a closed pane flips to `completed` without needing an explicit `kill`.
fixed: `delegate(background:true)` now works end-to-end. It had been silently broken since Phase A shipped.
`/reload` on a session with changes shows the actual delta again, instead of reporting "no changes."
Tall screenshots pasted into the TUI no longer cover the conversation.
Compaction summaries no longer accumulate stray temp-file paths across turns.

timeline.tagline: Background delegation for every user — tmux as the shipping baseline, full control panel (tail/steer/kill/harvest).

timeline.title: Cache Economics + Discoverability + Self-Knowledge

added: **Recent Ancestry** — the preload auto-injects your last three session-log entries, so the next self sees continuity without paying the cached-prefix cost.
**soma tool** from the shell + **`capabilities()`** inside a session — two ways to see what tools the agent actually has available.
**soma new muscle** and **soma new protocol** — scaffold a new skill or rule in one command, frontmatter pre-filled.
**Background delegation**: `delegate(background:true)` spawns a child and returns immediately; `children list` shows status across sessions.
`soma children spawn / list / watch / tail / kill` available to all users — shell-side and in-session views share one registry.
changed: Cached prompt prefix shrank ~25% per boot. Agent Notes moved to `memory/notes/soma-log.md` where they're read, not carried in the cached context.
Migration system is data-driven — `## Doctor Actions` blocks in the migration map declare what doctor should backfill. New settings additions no longer need CLI changes.
Terminal tab title reads `σ — <session> — <cwd>`, so you can tell two Soma sessions apart at a glance.
fixed: Pi's preventive OAuth-billing warning no longer fires on boot. Real billing errors are still caught at runtime and shown with context.
13 settings keys backfilled idempotently for projects upgrading from any version since v0.11 — your customizations are preserved.
Five Pro scripts (`soma seam / refactor / scrape / github / browser`) work for every install during the v0.21.x beta.

timeline.tagline: Cache economics + discoverability + self-knowledge. ~25% smaller cached prefix, callable tool registry, one-command muscle scaffolding.

timeline.title: Cache Stickiness

changed: Iterating on your setup is free — `/reload` keeps your session's cached memory warm, so there's no dollar cost for rapid iteration.
Body edits apply on your terms — run `/rebuild` when you want them live this session, or skip it and they land naturally on your next start.
The restart banner became a quiet statusline tag that tells you exactly what each file change actually needs.
added: `soma update --yes` for scripted upgrades — the documented `npm install -g meetsoma@latest && soma update --yes` one-liner now truly works unattended.
CHANGELOG.md ships with every install — read what's new without leaving your terminal.

timeline.tagline: Cache stickiness: /reload keeps your session warm. No dollar cost for rapid iteration.

changed: Pi assembles the system prompt now — Soma writes SYSTEM.md and APPEND_SYSTEM.md and Pi auto-discovers them. Faster boots, cheaper child agents.
`soma check-updates` shows three layers — CLI, agent, workspace — with the fix command for any drift.
`soma doctor` quietly bumps stale workspace markers when no migration's actually needed.
added: Eight child roles now — auditor joined for post-release review.
Five built-in code-search tools: code_find, code_map, code_refs, code_structure, code_blast.
Three more roles: planner, doc_writer, reflector. Seven total.
Curator can auto-apply proposals in one command — no second pass to integrate findings.
Per-role scratchpads track pending amendments at a glance.
Three specialized roles to start: verifier, builder, curator.
Curator reads every child's MLR report and writes proposals back to body files.
`soma-dev children mlr / curate / apply` CLI for the loop.
Cost and token tracking per child run.
Roles declare a model chain (preferred + fallbacks) instead of a single hard-coded model.
Health checks plus cooldown so flaky models don't burn budget retrying.
`delegate` tool — Soma can spawn a child agent for bounded work.
Role files (`body/children/<role>.md`) define each child's persona, tools, and model.
Sandbox isolation for safe delegation testing.

changed: Pi runtime → 0.67.68 — better network retry, stable date format, tool-call error handling.
Release script keeps dev and main in sync. Main can no longer fall a release behind.
fixed: `soma update` and `check-updates` no longer crash on fresh installs.
Thin-CLI help covers the full command surface.
Fresh `npm install -g meetsoma` works again — was shipping broken tarballs.
changed: `soma init` sets up your project; `soma update` updates the runtime — they're separate commands now.
Pi runtime pinned to your Soma version. Doctor flags drift instead of silently shipping stale.
added: Statusline pings you when an update's available.
`soma model` command — switch models from CLI with fuzzy matching.
Claude Opus 4.7 with adaptive thinking.
Upstream audit tooling for tracking Pi version drift.
changed: Smarter prompt caching — tool changes no longer invalidate the system prompt.

fixed: Image budget auto-compact loop — guard against repeated compact triggers

timeline.title: Somaverse Edition

added: `soma login` — pair your agent with Somaverse through a cloud relay.
28 workspace + browser tools through the hub proxy.
Device-key auth for automatic hub mode.

timeline.tagline: Somaverse Edition — the visual workspace where AI agents live.

added: Image budget auto-compact for screenshot-heavy sessions
Configurable breathe thresholds for large-context models
Sandbox testing from dev/main/beta sources

fixed: Script descriptions in system prompt no longer show "---" for scripts with YAML frontmatter
changed: Documentation updated with current versions and extension list across 6 pages

added: Smarter error messages — raw API errors now show clear, actionable guidance instead of JSON dumps.
Auth-aware billing — detects your plan type (subscription vs API key) and handles billing hiccups accordingly.
Auto-retry on transient errors — session startup issues resolve themselves without manual intervention.
Runtime integrity checks — catches version drift before it ships.
Cache health tracking — see cache performance in the statusline. Alerts on costly invalidations.
Idle session detection — auto-shutdown prevents runaway sessions.
changed: Major cost fix — stopped a $152/day cache bleed from image handling. Sessions are dramatically cheaper.

added: soul.md replaces SOMA.md — identity is discovered from your codebase, not configured.
Minimal first-run boot — new projects start lean, Soma learns through use.
soma session tool — strip images from session logs (16MB → 2.6MB), list and analyze sessions.
11 bundled scripts (was 6) — more tools out of the box.
Extension allowlist — control which extensions load, doctor reports unlisted ones.
changed: Intentional preloads — `soma inhale` loads memory on purpose, not automatically.

timeline.tagline: Doctor & Migration — projects upgrade cleanly across versions.

added: Soma themes — sky-blue accent, custom dark and light palettes.
soma github — scan GitHub repos without cloning: structure, map, deps, audit.
Keepalive auto-pause — stops pinging on API errors to prevent runaway sessions.
Docker sandbox — isolated E2E testing for pre-release verification.
Project health dashboard — soma-health.sh shows project state at a glance.
changed: Pi runtime updated to 0.66.1 — bug fixes, no breaking changes.
Scripts reorganized — dev scripts separated from bundled scripts.

added: Inbox system — agents can leave messages for each other across sessions.
Intentional preloads — new autoInject setting controls when memory loads.
7 new documentation pages — scripts, sessions, inbox, workspaces, and more.
Script drift detection — catches when installed scripts diverge from source.
changed: TL;DR replaces Digest — cleaner warm-tier format across all AMPS content.
Documentation accuracy overhaul — 30+ stale references fixed.

added: Auto-exhale on idle — session saves itself when keepalive runs out.
Keepalive limits — configurable max pings to prevent runaway sessions.
MAP system — workflow automation maps for repeatable dev processes.
changed: Doctor improvements — better migration detection and template comparison.
Warm content format unified — consistent TL;DR loading across protocols and muscles.

added: soma doctor — project health check with automatic migration for version upgrades.
soma status / soma health — infrastructure health at a glance.
soma --version and soma --help — proper CLI help system.
Migration phases — automatic settings and template updates across versions.
First-breath template — guides the agent's first session in a new project.
Warm AMPS — protocols and muscles load by temperature tier (hot/warm/cold).
6 new test suites — doctor, settings, protocols, muscles, identity, migrations.
changed: CLI routing overhaul — commands discover scripts automatically.
Starter content updated — better defaults for new projects.

added: soma --help rewrite — shows scripts, commands, and usage.
soma-theme.sh — switch terminal color themes.
changed: DNA.md rewrite — clearer project conventions template.

added: /inhale guard — warns when no preload exists or preload is stale.
5 new scripts — soma-seam, soma-reflect, soma-query, soma-focus, soma-plans.
soma-code v2.0 — blast radius analysis, TypeScript error context, improved refs.
Slash command usage hints for 10 commands.
changed: Pi runtime updated to 0.64.0 with new extension APIs.
Semver discipline — feature releases bump minor version.

added: /soma doctor — migration check with auto-run and confirmation.
Monorepo-aware first breath — detects and lists sub-projects.
Richer preload template — Weather, Who You Were, Orient From sections.
Body template scaffolding — section headers in body.md and voice.md.
changed: System prompt budget raised from 4,000 to 10,000 tokens.
Init UX — detects global vs parent .soma/, three-way prompt.

added: Init UX — prompt before scaffolding, parent .soma/ inheritance.
Pi upstream sync — 71 commits, built-in tools as extensions.
Protocol coaching voice — 14 protocols rewritten from spec to guidance.
Command provenance — /soma status shows which extension owns each command.
soma inhale — CLI preload management with --list and partial name match.
soma map — top-level MAP subcommand with --list and prompt config.
Settings-driven heat overrides — per-project AMPS heat control.
Statusline preload indicator — shows save status, smart /exhale detection.
Hub CLI — /hub install, /hub share, /list remote for community content.
Heat auto-detect — protocols and muscles automatically get temperature tiers.
soma-code.sh — codebase navigator with map, find, refs, replace.
Session export — /export saves conversation as styled HTML.
Hub integration — install protocols and muscles from the community.
Drop-in script commands — soma code, soma verify, soma refactor.
Core protocols bundled — breath-cycle, working-style, heat-tracking.
Heat system — protocols and muscles load by temperature (hot/warm/cold).
Automatic migration — settings and templates upgrade across versions.
Community sync — protocols shared between projects via hub.
npm install — meetsoma package published, one-command install.
Pi runtime 0.61.1 — stable upstream with extension support.
27 documentation pages — full coverage of features and configuration.
Open install — anyone can install via npm, no invite needed.
Voice system — agent communication style persists across sessions.
23 documentation pages — getting started, protocols, muscles, configuration.
Extension system — TypeScript hooks for custom agent behavior.
Scratch pad — persistent notes that survive across sessions.
Session warnings — alerts for context limits and idle detection.
Code scanning tools — soma-code.sh with structure and find commands.
Router extension — /soma commands for agent self-management.
Auto-breathe — automatic session rotation at context limits.
Dev tools — soma-verify, soma-refactor for codebase maintenance.
Prompt intelligence — system prompt compiles from identity + protocols + muscles.
Session stabilization — reliable session logs and preload handoffs.
AMPS architecture — protocols, muscles, automations, scripts as four layers.
Distribution system — bundled vs installable content tiers.
Session intelligence — preloads carry context across session boundaries.
Breath cycle — inhale, work, exhale rhythm for session management.
The engine — core agent runtime with extension loading and identity discovery.
Settings system — JSON configuration for behavior tuning.
